headline: Wall Street's 'fear index' hits highest point since October
summary: As the war between the U.S.-Israel and Iran continues, Wall Street's "fear index" hit the highest point since October 2025. The CBOE Volatility Index (VIX) is a popular measure of the stock market's expectation of volatility based on S&P 500 index options. It is calculated and disseminated ...

headline: Deutsche Bank favours exchanges amid market volatility, upgrades Intercontinental
summary: Investing.com -- Intercontinental Exchange was upgraded to Buy from Hold by Deutsche Bank, which said exchanges appear best positioned among financial market firms as volatility lifts trading activity.

raw.headline: Deutsche Bank favours exchanges amid market volatility, upgrades Intercontinental

headline: Verano to Report Fourth Quarter and 2025 Full Year Financial Results on March 12th, 2026
summary: CHICAGO, March 06, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Verano Holdings Corp. (Cboe CA: VRNO) (OTCQX: VRNO) (“Verano” or the “Company”), a leading multi-state cannabis company, today announced that it plans to release financial results for the fourth quarter and fiscal year ended on December 31, 2025, before the market opens on Thursday, March 12, 2026. A conference call and webcast with analysts and investors is scheduled for March 12, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. ET / 7:30 a.m. CT to discuss the results. Investors

headline: Bekaert - Update on the Share Buyback Program and Liquidity Agreement
summary: Update on the Share Buyback Program and the Liquidity Agreement Period from 26 February 2026 to 4 March 2026 Share Buyback ProgramOn 26 February 2026, Bekaert announced the start of the next tranche of its share buyback program, for a total maximum consideration of up to € 75 million. headline: Cboe Record Volumes Raise Questions On Sustainability And Investor Positioning
summary: Cboe Global Markets (BATS:CBOE) reports record monthly trading volumes across several business lines. Proprietary index options and European platforms are among the areas reaching new volume records. The records highlight activity across both U.S. and international markets in the latest reported month. For you as an investor, the key point is that Cboe Global Markets operates core market infrastructure, with trading venues that sit at the center of index options, equities, and derivatives...
